implemented: Pico SDK + FreeRTOS firmware workspace and source layout
host-side monitor, dashboard, discovery, and simulator
build, flash, and validation scripts with pytest coverage
missing: verified real-hardware flash and serial session
deeper firmware-side validation and optional watchdog verification
deferred: real Pico bring-up until hardware is attached
done_definition: validated host tooling with simulator and real serial device
firmware build artifact produced cleanly on demand
documented flash/bring-up flow exercised on hardware
next_phase: continue host-tooling and simulator improvements while deferring real hardware bring-up

continuation_backlog.title: Add host-side telemetry session export and summary stats
continuation_backlog.description: Extend the host tooling to persist per-session metadata and generate a concise summary that is useful even in simulator mode.
continuation_backlog.commit_message: feature: add telemetry session export summaries
